mapper.sql: pmj.dept_name, pmj.office_name, pmj.team_name, pmj.dept_id, pmj.job_name, pmj.job_id, pmj.job_class, pmj.harm_factory,pmj.job_tuboo, pmj.id, pmj.create_time, pmj.create_by, pmj.update_time, pmj.update_by, (select pmp.project_name + '、' from pm_medical_relevance pmr join pm_medical_project pmp on pmr.project_id = pmp.id and pmr.project_type = '上岗前体检项目' where pmr.medical_job_id = pmj.id for xml Path('')) as go_work_str, (select pmp.project_name + '、' from pm_medical_relevance pmr join pm_medical_project pmp on pmr.project_id = pmp.id and pmr.project_type = '在岗期间体检项目' where pmr.medical_job_id = pmj.id for xml Path('')) as in_work_str, (select pmp.project_name + '、' from pm_medical_relevance pmr join pm_medical_project pmp on pmr.project_id = pmp.id and pmr.project_type = '离岗体检项目' where pmr.medical_job_id = pmj.id for xml Path('')) as out_work_str

${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.office_name as ${tAlias}_office_name, ${tAlias}.team_name as ${tAlias}_team_name, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.job_id as ${tAlias}_job_id, ${tAlias}.job_class as ${tAlias}_job_class,${tAlias}.harm_factory as ${tAlias}_harm_factory, ${tAlias}.job_tuboo as ${tAlias}_job_tuboo, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_medical_job (dept_name, office_name, team_name, dept_id, job_name, job_id, job_class, harm_factory,job_tuboo, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{officeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{harmFactory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobTuboo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_medical_job set dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, office_name = #{officeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team_name = #{teamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_id = #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, job_class = #{jobClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, harm_factory = #{harmFactory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_tuboo = #{jobTuboo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
